triples.subject: Tesla’s Gigafactory
triples.object: beneficial tax rate from the Shanghai government
triples.sentence: Tesla’s Gigafactory was granted a beneficial tax rate from the Shanghai government.

triples.subject: China
triples.object: 16 percent of batteries and vehicles sold in Europe in 2022
triples.sentence: where 16 percent of batteries and vehicles sold were made in China in 2022.

triples.subject: Thailand
triples.object: the third largest recipient of Chinese EV exports in 2022
triples.sentence: Thailand was the third largest recipient of Chinese EV exports by quantity in 2022.

triples.subject: 20 percent of electric car models
triples.sentence: as an example in 2022, 20 percent of electric car models on offer in China were priced at less than $15,000.
